HomePage.title: Welcome to AI Agent Crafter
HomePage.subtitle: This tool helps you build instructions for your AI agents. Follow the steps and download your file at the end.

Step1.phaseDescription: Select the file type that will be created

Step2.phaseDescription: Which tool will you use with your agent?

agentInstructions.name: agent
agentInstructions.helperText: Give your agent a clear name so it is easy to understand what it does.

specificInstructions.name: instructions file
specificInstructions.helperText: Give your instructions a clear name to know what it is about.

prompts.name: prompt
prompts.helperText: Give your prompt a clear name so it is easy to understand what it will be used for.

skills.name: skill
skills.helperText: Give your skill a clear name so it is easy to understand what it will be used for.

agentInstructions.name: agent
agentInstructions.descriptionPlaceholder: You are an agent specialized in...
agentInstructions.helperText: Describe what your agent will do. Tip: always use second person singular (you).

specificInstructions.name: instructions file
specificInstructions.helperText: Describe what your instructions file will do. Tip: always use second person singular (you).

prompts.name: prompt
prompts.helperText: Describe what your prompt will do. Tip: always use second person singular (you).

skills.name: skill
skills.helperText: Describe what your skill will do. Tip: always use second person singular (you).

Step5.phaseDescription: Fill only the header fields based on the selected template.
Step5.emptySection: This file format does not have this section.

Step6.phaseDescription: Fill the content fields based on the selected template.
Step6.emptySection: This file format does not have this section.

Step7.phaseDescription: Your file will look like this:

githubCopilot.description: GitHub Copilot is an AI coding assistant developed by GitHub and OpenAI that suggests code and autocompletions while you build software.

gemini.description: Gemini is a language model by Google DeepMind designed for conversational tasks, content generation, and reasoning assistance.

chatGPT.description: ChatGPT is an OpenAI conversational assistant that generates human-like responses for support, writing, and productivity tasks.

codex.description: Codex is an OpenAI model specialized in code understanding and generation across multiple programming languages.

agentZero.description: Agent Zero is an AI agent framework that helps developers build and orchestrate autonomous agents for different workflows.

warp.description: Warp is a modern terminal focused on developer productivity, including AI-assisted command workflows.

standards.description: Standard instructions file for AI agents (AGENTS.md, SKILLS.md, etc), containing guidelines and rules for agent behavior and interactions.

description.label: Description
description.hint: A short description of the project that will be used on the instructions template.

applyto.label: Apply to
applyto.hint: A short description of what the instructions apply to.

maininstructions.label: Main instructions
maininstructions.hint: The main instructions for the project.

repositoryname.label: Repository name
repositoryname.hint: The name of the repository where the instructions will be used.

description.label: Description
description.hint: A short description of the agent

tools.label: Tools
tools.hint: Specify tools this agent can use

mcp-servers.label: MCP servers
mcp-servers.hint: MCP servers this agent can access

role.label: Role
role.hint: Describe the role of the agent
